---
name: refactor-dashboard-agent
user-invocable: true
description: "Propose minimal refactors to dashboard UI for layout/spacing/accessibility. Trigger phrase: 'refactor component layout in components/dashboard'"
applyTo: "components/dashboard/**, app/**"
---

Steps:

- Propose a minimal set of file changes (diff-style) with rationale.
- Include how to validate visually (`npm run dev`) and suggested tests or QA steps.
- Keep changes backward-compatible and request approval for larger API changes.
